title: Custom Blood Particles
description: Adds customizable blood particles, sound effects, and ground splatters to PvP. Choose your color, intensity, and style!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/388e970961ba24ea4c00531a9310e66abddbf229.png)
## 🩸 Custom Blood Particles
**Elevate your Minecraft combat experience with fully customizable, performance-friendly blood effects!**

Unlike standard blood plugins, **Custom Blood Particles** gives players full control over their combat aesthetics. Whether you want realistic horror, arcade-style sparks, or anime-inspired effects, this plugin has it all.

---

## ✨ Features

* **🎨 12 Unique Blood Colors:**
    Customize your combat style! Choose from **Red, Pink, Green, Blue, Aqua, Yellow, Orange, Purple, Black, White, Gold, and Gray**.
    * *Green for aliens, Gold for VIPs, Pink for anime vibes!*

* **🩸 Adjustable Gore Levels:**
    * **Level 1 (Low):** Minimal particles, clean and simple.
    * **Level 2 (Medium):** Standard blood effects with splashes.
    * **Level 3 (Extreme):** Heavy bleeding, ground puddles, and intense particles.

* **💨 Performance Friendly (FPS Control):**
    Players can toggle the "mist/dust" effect **ON or OFF** (`/blood dust off`) to boost FPS during heavy PvP battles.

* **☠️ Realistic Ground Splatters:**
    Blood doesn't just vanish in the air; it forms puddles on the ground using optimized particles (no block changes, lag-free!) that clean themselves up automatically.

* **🔊 Dynamic Sound Design:**
    Satisfying "squish" and "bone crack" sounds vary in pitch with every hit, making combat feel impactful without being repetitive.

* **🏹 Projectile Support:**
    Arrows and projectiles carry the shooter's blood settings—if you shoot someone, they bleed *your* chosen color!

---

## 📜 Commands & Usage

* `/blood`
    * Opens the help menu and lists all available colors.
* `/blood <color>`
    * Sets your personal blood color (e.g., `/blood pink`, `/blood gold`).
* `/blood level <1-3>`
    * Sets the intensity of the blood effect (1 = Low, 3 = Extreme).
* `/blood dust <on|off>`
    * Toggles the atmospheric mist particles. Turn this OFF to increase FPS.

![commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6fb8da1fbcea1edd305f3c9bd04de60cbcc69e3_0.webp)
---

## 🛠️ Installation & Compatibility

1.  Download the `.jar` file.
2.  Drag and drop it into your server's `plugins` folder.
3.  Restart your server.
4.  **Done!** No configuration required.

* **Supported Versions:** Minecraft 1.21+
* **Supported Software:** Paper, Purpur, Spigot, Bukkit.
* **Dependencies:** None! (Plug and play).

---
*Developed for a visceral and customizable PvP experience.*
